data.title: Northern 3 VCT Celebrates Successful IPO of The Beauty Tech Group
data.description:
An update from Northern 3 VCT ( (GB:NTN) ) is now available.

Northern 3 VCT PLC announced the successful IPO of its largest unquoted holding, The Beauty Tech Group, on the London Stock Exchange. The IPO values the company at approximately £300 million, marking a significant increase from its previous valuation. The proceeds from the IPO will enable The Beauty Tech Group to further accelerate its growth strategy, reflecting positively on Northern 3 VCT’s investment portfolio and potentially enhancing shareholder value.

More about Northern 3 VCT

Northern 3 VCT PLC is involved in the investment sector, focusing on unquoted holdings with potential for growth. The company has investments in various industries, including the global at-home beauty devices market, which is part of the broader beauty and personal care industry.

Average Trading Volume: 38,254

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Learn more about NTN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Yancoal Completes Acquisition to Boost Stake in Moolarben Joint Venture
data.description:
Yancoal Australia ( (AU:YAL) ) has shared an update.

Yancoal Australia Ltd has completed the acquisition of an additional 3.75% interest in the Moolarben Joint Venture, increasing its economic stake to 98.75%. The transaction, valued at A$110.5 million, will be funded through cash holdings and future operating cash flows, with payments spread over five years. This acquisition is expected to enhance Yancoal’s production and revenue, consolidating its position in the coal industry.

More about Yancoal Australia

Yancoal Australia Ltd is a major player in the coal industry, primarily engaged in the production and sale of coal. The company operates in Australia and is listed on both the Hong Kong and Australian stock exchanges, focusing on low-cost, tier-1 coal assets.

For an in-depth examination of YAL stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: NRC Group Finland Secures Two-Year Contract Extension with Finnish Transportation Infrastructure Agency
data.description:
NRC Group ASA ( (NNRRF) ) has issued an update.

NRC Group Finland has secured a two-year extension of its frame contract with the Finnish Transportation Infrastructure Agency, valued between EUR 50 and 80 million. This contract, which runs from January 2027 to December 2028, marks a significant achievement for NRC Group’s Material division in Finland, highlighting their consistent performance and commitment to delivering value to clients.

More about NRC Group ASA

NRC Group ASA operates in the transportation infrastructure industry, focusing on providing procurement, logistics, and warehousing services for railway-specific materials. The company is known for its strong market presence in Finland, where it delivers essential infrastructure services.

Average Trading Volume: 557,887

Current Market Cap: NOK1.48B

data.title: Tharisa Transitions to Underground Mining for Long-Term Sustainability
data.description:
Tharisa ( (GB:THS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tharisa has announced a phased transition to underground mining at its Tharisa Mine, aiming to enhance operational efficiency and sustainability. This transition is expected to extend the mine’s life beyond 50 years, maintaining production capacity and offering growth opportunities. The development will be financed through internal cash and external funding, with a focus on reducing environmental impact and increasing long-term value creation.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:THS) stock is a Buy with a £1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tharisa stock, see the GB:THS Stock Forecast page.

More about Tharisa

Tharisa is an integrated resource group involved in exploration, mining, processing, and the marketing of PGMs and chrome concentrates. The company is critical to the energy transition and decarbonisation of economies, leveraging innovation and technology. Its main asset is the Tharisa Mine in South Africa, and it is also developing the Karo Platinum Project in Zimbabwe. Tharisa is listed on the Johannesburg and London stock exchanges.

Average Trading Volume: 320,564

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £313.4M

data.title: Rosenbauer International Appoints Jörg Schuschnig as New CFO
data.description:
An announcement from Rosenbauer International ( (GB:0FRW) ) is now available.

Rosenbauer International AG has appointed Jörg Schuschnig as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective by October 1, 2026. Schuschnig, a seasoned financial expert with extensive experience in various leadership roles, will succeed CEO Robert Ottel, who has been serving as interim CFO since July. This strategic appointment is expected to strengthen Rosenbauer’s financial leadership and support its growth ambitions.

More about Rosenbauer International

Rosenbauer International AG is a company operating in the firefighting equipment industry, providing a range of products and services related to fire and safety technology. The company is listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange and engages in official trade across several European markets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,268

Current Market Cap: €453.9M
